blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light drizzle, highs of 43°F, winds around 21 mph.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
